data: Black on top white on bottom shaped like a computer mouse.
Flashing green lights and fast speed
This came extremeley close to the left of our commercial plane left wing - I did notify Delta Airlines once we landed.
7 red orbs, gaining speed and elevation, fly from south to north directly overhead before disappearing
Driving on the way to work when I saw this.
Bright light multiple colors changing does not show up on sky view app. As a star or planet
Banana shaped UFO yellow lights down side, with blue halo. Hovering moving slightly side to side. Halo flashed like surrounding orb.
From a strange cloud, multiple glistening dots fly over Phoenix.
I have been practicing taking night sky Pictures with my iPhone 13 Max Pro.
Noticed bright, white planet sized object in west-northwest sky just above treeline in my backyard moving erratically.
3 orb like lights flashing in color and hovering in place before moving south one at a time
Cigar shaped object zipping then disappearing in Queens NYC
Hovered in one general area for almost an hour; quickly changed directions and made figure 8 patterns
Small circular object in sky with flashing lights which hovered about 5-10 miles away in the sky for 40 minutes
Watched it float in just one spot for around 5 minutes from my car then it just disappeared.
Unidentifiable object seen while driving, lost sight after merging to I-95 and was no longer facing it
Flying to the East at 39,000 saw 6 UFO's at diff speeds, altitudes (btn 50, and 80 thousand feet) for ~ 1 hr
it just moved down and moved left side afterthat it's just disappeared.
V formation of lights moving rapidly from the southwest and then turning southeast towards Offutt AFB.
I was sitting at my terrace using my phone when i saw the fast moving object in the sky
Large chevron shaped object almost overhead
5 lights in a triangle shape. Center of craft couldn't be seen
Large triangular craft with red corner lights
A big silver sphere sat still in the sky then moved to the left an sat still a couple more times then took off to the right,FAST!
Strange fast moving blinking lights on horizon which was too silent for a regular aircraft
Another active night in the skies in the IPNW
Silver UAP at approximately 5000ft the swims through the sky in an organic matter way with exhaust trail at faster than speed of sound
Caught on my Google nest camera. Happened at 9:16pm and now at 4:54am
Have a camera video. From 2nd floor.
Light seen moving quickly south to north, then back south along same path, then changed to moving WNW
Two bright and slightly amber illuminations in the shape of discs.
I saw a bright light sloop across the sky
Some sort of sliver object static in the sky against clouds.
My wife saw first on our road was 3 she called me went outside one broke away I saw 2
Hovering disk across the sea from Pacific Coast Highway near coastline!
An extremely large, square, relatively flat extremely large ufo with four lights, one on each corner of the square.
I was walking to school and seen something
Bright white oval object vanished when I looked away for one second.
Watched the sphere travel east to west against the prevailing wind without sound observed through binoculars.
2 objects hovering for 30 seconds, then dimmed and disappeared
I got a video of half of what I saw, it's not star link I seen many flashing lights going back and forth, almost if a battle was happe
I was checking to make sure that my garage was locked when I looked up and saw an eraser sized radiant orb flowing under and over cloud
Wife seen 1 and then 2 craft appear and disappear, then told me to come outside and I started to record but only seen 1
A strange object that appeared in a set of 15 pictures that I took while on an eagle watch on 2/4/24 around 10:30 AM.
There were three of us in the car but they did not see the object.
Multiple crafts I've been seeing for a week straight.
Coming home from work at night. Thought it was helicopter then it darted off. I’ve flown on hundreds of helicopters this wasn’t one.
I am sure it was a ufo and I know the airport witness it.
I saw a white circle suddenly appear and then disappear.
5 orb-like structures seen near a small establishment.
I was driving on route 17 south of Wolfsville, MD. While on the road my wife and I had notice 3 triangle/cone like objects hovering
Noticed moving lights that would move, then stay stationary for long periods and then form linear patterns. Some were flashing
I went out onto deck to get water. Noticed the very bright, flashing lights going from east to west, which very rarely happens.
Crescent shape, open up, moving lights red and orange
A silent orange light flew low and quickly in a straight line due north along Gorman St. and vanished in a wink.
Vertical launch of 737 type plane with blue hump on back of Fuselage heading up toward space.
3 Stationary lights in a horizontal line above the tree line
All were low, groups of two stars moving about the same speed as planes do maybe a touch faster then groups of three trianglular forma
Star suddenly moved at high rate of speed
Looking out window, saw new bright flashing light. Took picture, dimmed and moved across sky very fast
Was covered in the shroud of fog- mist. Then a umbrella like fog mist was dropped
Fuzzy looking light moving across the sky from west to east.
Observed a bright large spherical object tracked and merged with a smaller sphere
Slow moving object, Silent, glowing circle
High Speed Object, no flashing, no sound Night Sky NNW to ENE
An object with lights on either end, moving perpendicular to the lights. Ahead of it was a blurry white bow wake in a crystal clear sky
Blurry lights moving fast then disapear and rotate before it
Hazy white light that appeared to turn headlights on
Saw a rather impressive “shooting star” while satellite. A few minutes later we saw a white light with an orb of “blurry”light below it
Fuzzy/hazy yellow light in the shape of an orb with a smaller light behind it. Almost looked like the light had a halo look to it.
Group of lights in night sky looked different than the rest
UFO With Bright White Light That Shot Down A Cylindrical Beam Of Light Shot From My Porch When I Got Home
Circular object surrounded by hazy white light emitting a triangular light morphing into a curved Rectangle ahead of the craft
Large, steadily moving light over Falls Church, VA toward DC. At 7:25pm, approximately when it was over DC, released a spray of liquid.
Clear sky, 2 lights obscured by mist moved slowly, stopped, lights then clear (later identified as drone)
Two objects seen from ground flying against wind today.
A white pulsating light high in the sky going west to east the object shot light in the direction it was going then split in two faded
While driving I noticed a strange object in the sky, when I pulled over to get a better look it seemed to shift and then disappeared.
Odd, flashing object I could only describe during recording as "flying police car"
The thing is I see these regularly and I have time loss I can't even remember these particular pictures.
Object moving slowing across the sky, suddenly turning, increasing speed and fading.
Slowly traveling from west to east with a halo around it. Perfectly clear evening, then just stopped hovered white plume then disappear
Bright light in sky changing shape but almost boomerang shaped & moving, 2 smaller lights showed up, then it all disappeared
Standing to the west of this object it hung in the sky and looked like a very large star. It made erratic sharp movements
Saw an object in the sky that had a bright center and a distorted outer ring, a bright light started to grow out of the object .
It was a clear night but the object was emitting fog and mist along with projecting blue lights. It was half a mile high in the sky.
A black rectangular craft rises out of river bed floats in the air, moving horizontally back and forth before disappearing into the sky
White object traveling from west to east
Took my dog to the pong for a restroom break, seen 4 red/blue orbs making a diamond shape but spinning clockwise together, slowly.
One slow moving (west to east) distant light suddenly appeared as two, side by side. Soon after both projected fan shaped lights ahead.
I was in playground and absentmindedly looking at the sky and saw a streak coming down from the sky it was orange seemed to hit ground.
I saw a stationary orb of flashing lights in the sky surrounded by an aura-like electric looking mist
8 Lights Moving in counter clockwise pattern with other lights making passes through and below the formation
Hovering bright green orb then incredible fast moving across sky sudden stops and moving again at incredible speed
The object seen at midnight was blinking continuously . Upon zooming in with the phone it's colour appeared to change drastically.
A Southbound craft overhead with a return object heading Northbound
I'm seeing multiple in secluded location from 3:30-5:30 am two nights ago I saw one huge one land.
2 balls of light came out of one big ball of light
Approximately 330AM in a NNE sky, a cigar shaped object traveled around the Dubhe star in the Big Dipper.
I took Astronomy and know that this wasn't normal, another individual also saw a ufo about the same time. It went over very slowly
Strange shape in the sky that didn’t last long. Quick photos were taken.
Triangle formation of lights with other lights making passes through and around the formation
As capture by front door camera
1 to 3 fairly bright orbs (varied) maneuvering and loitering in ways uncharacteristic of typ. aircraft. No reference to judge distance.
Driving north on NC-540, we noticed a dark object hovering over highway. We saw a second smaller object pass through or behind it.
Triangle shape made by 3 lights, the center had no lights. Orb spotted at the same time.
2 orbs different shapes, or 1 orb changing shape
A bright light shined in my window once I seen it it zipped away
Whatever it was was crouched down behind a bush, when I noticed it got up and was thin and about 8 tall with long limbs.
How the moon looks with thin clouds over it. It looked like light was bleeding out from edges. It could have been round, looked oval
On our ring camera we can see a large glowing object dropping down over Palm Springs.
While operating an aircraft in cruise at FL400, the crew observed 3 lights appearing and disappearing for approximately 1 hr 25 min.
One triangular shaped craft hovering over area doing aerobatics in daytime
Rotating object that automatically blows up to a disc/circle 3 to 4 times larger
Seen looking south, flew west bound
Similar to a shooting star, but did not fizzle out. Lasted the entirety of the horizon.
Fast moving, silent light, moving east to west.
Low cloud layer looked overhead and saw slow moving white orb with blinking lights. Lights go out and dark shadow continues moving.
A vertical type object with red blue and white lights like a needle the white lights went down the shaft. Wider top was red and blue
Bright but variable light travelling east to west at speeds much greater than normal jet traffic and faster than a satellite.
White light in the sky, no sound, and no wingtip/tail lights.
Saw a white, flat cylinder float above Mt Tom
They were flying low towards me from the south east almost side by side zig zagging really fast flew over me and cut back sharp south
North east sky, looked like sun shining off aircraft, i checked my radar app no aircraft in area, i look back up and its gone
Bright light that zoomed off at inhumane speeds over the horizon.
Viewed a small red circle moving behind a cloud, when it emerged into clear skies it turned white before disappearing.
I saw something moving north leaving a white trail. Movement blur was to north too. it moved slowly and then shot off disappearing.
Large red glowing object that appeared low In sky and moving towards us. Looked like it was on fire. Moved around oddly. Then flew away
Moving starlike object, going upward, and moving forward, in a group of 3 or 4
Parking at home, my son told me, I don't recognize that star, when I looked it was so bright and big!
I saw a bright light above the tree line, and it disappeared when I looked away
Saw amber lighted object slowly descend from sky, then lights went out and it disappeared.
2 craft one surrounded with a hazy light
Moved west then north and slightly south no sound I was painting a piece of furniture outside lasted about 7 minutes
Stationary ball of light with hazy glow around it
Dark object moving slowly just after dusk.
Initially we observed 1 but as we continued to look we spotted many more
While pruning a tree observed objects circling est. 5000 ft above surface.
This has main lights with red and blue flashing that seems to rotate
First saw orangish white lights rotating or flashing from a distance in the north sky.
White metallic capsule flew over very fast, being chased by Apache helicopter.
I observed a bright light in the eastern sky. A separate light shot out from it circled back and returned to it. Then they vanished
Another sighting. Two different, observable craft particulars
Low altitude, diamond formation. Climbed in altitude, with one splitting off.
Flashing green and red light not a plane or satellite.
Looking out back door through the trees towards a road on the ridge when I noticed an orange light seemingly close to the ground..
MASSIVE triangle shaped object with a light in the center, "hiding" behind dark clouds.
I witnessed a cylindrical craft flying through the sky and then it poof disappeared
White light illuminated stationary before rapidly heading North and disappearing
UFO looked like a huge elongated wing seen edge on. It was hovering about 2 km from my location. It then abruptly vanished.
The weather in Wisconsin was good so I usually sit on my deck. It faces west. All of a sudden I saw these objects and took a picture.
Light flew by then went away , small almost on the same hight of my building
Multiple objects. Visible with sunglasses. Not visible with naked eye, only shimmers of light.
I was terrified and it got very close but was silent and huge
The videos are from 2 different people at 2 different locations miles apart in Suffolk, Virginia
Myself, husband, and son saw 4 total orbs traveling spaced out through the night sky.
Over multiple nights I've taken various long exposures of moving lights in the sky, last night i captured some video
Saw silver sphere hanging over street that stayed less than 5 seconds then flew off
Sighting of lights throughout the entire night with direct sighting of the ship in the shape of a flying saucer at dawn.
The plane like object turned around in mid air and disappeared in the sky when there were no clouds
I was talking to my friend and we saw the UFO head straight first but then it turned around in midair and disappeared in the sky
Saw a orangeish orb in the sky.
Multiple orbs of light over the Pacific Ocean maneuvering in a purposeful way for over two hours
Bright light that turn green,red,off-white moving in the sky in a way that defies the laws of physics
Hummel Park UFO experience. Sera (22) avg person
it was S shaped on the side but was sliding to change directions
At least 40 orbs of light rising from the horizon in the distance
Light flicker on house then looked up and seen triangle with 6 lights.
Object fell through cloud and left trail
Two lights star or satellite like over 45 min.
Coworker and I were taking samples and observed a stalled craft that stayed in the same position for at least 12 minutes.
Wife and i were smoking outside and i handed her the cigarette and i saw it over her shoulder. It was a massive red disk shaped "aura"
These 2 photos are from a camera that detects motion and took these two pictures less than 2 minutes of each other.
Vaguely cube shaped, with multicolored lights and some motion.
Saw a white light circle float & come across the skyline over my view of Pearl Harbor that phased out and disappeared from view
It looked like a cloud in front of a bright star to begin with…
Just past the Federal building silent object w/flashing blue lights heading north descending to low alt. over Westwood Park.
I was walking down the street coming to my home when i stoped to see the stars when I saw an Orange orb
Shooting white pinpoint flash observed while driving north on I-90
Me and my family were out on a walk. At the end of the meaningful walk me and my dad looked up and it zoomed, stopped, waved and left.
Outside facing East, see light in sky figure satellite..but stay for few second then moves off to the SW slowly, but flashing orange.
We saw a pair of lights above the mountain line during our drive that would appear/disappear.
object with a halo around it and another object following it
Slow moving apparently HUGE object (based on visibility of NIR reflectance). Nothing on FlightRadar at time.
From my front porch looking toward the west
A disc shped craft parked on the tree in my front garden ,
Outside at about 3 or 4 AM, notice flying object in sky. Barely visible, only illuminated by the moonlight.
I woke up and took my dog out to go to the bathroom, it was a clear night I just looked up and saw a triangle shape with lights.
Many high altitude orbs spotted swarming at high speed.
Ship was small, flying just above the light poles on the highway. It was a cigar shape but had a single fin on the back end
I was online watching a live stream of the sun and observed this object move across the sun
Started as one then turned into a diamond shape.
Large acre plus-sized triangular craft traveling approx 32000 feet.
Orb of fire flew/floated silently over and past me to meet up with a second
We saw what looked like dogfighting spacecraft
I was sitting on the back patio looked up and saw the UFO quickly pass over
Cigar/cylinder object, with 2 white light bars and red dot in the middle
Black triangle craft, one yellowish white light at each tip.
It was moving west and was spinning and changing shape, it kind of reminded me of an octopus.
Square objects with a green glow aura. Small green speckle of light surround them.
Woke up to a bright white light outside balcony window with a blue tint or like veil in the room.
3 white lights or orbs heading west toward the pacific
An object similar to a satellite shot across the sky in about 3 seconds, and turned about 40 degrees
1 large red/orange orb that split into 3 then slowly descended in formation. Then, all together they flew north until they disappeared
Two bright objects moving in the sky attract attention: they stop in the west, then move north, and one stops and returns to the east.
Too big to be a star, reflecting too much light to be a planet.
A line of lights stable at zenith
I was on break and looked at this cell tower as I smoked a cigarette then this started to happen for about 10 mins
Observing beach front off my deck when I spotted this
Silent pulsating green orb flying in extremely erratic way
White circle moving slowly about 1000 feet. No noise, no navigation lights constant speed very slow
Two craft of the same shape with orange glow in centre, flew immensely fast over the city before dissapearing behind shooting star
Saw a round disc moving quickly in the sky
3 perfectly aligned white lights passing very quickly, they didn’t make any sound.
I was walking back home from work and looked up in the sky there was this fireball flying across the sky
A completely silent, medium gray/translucent rectangular box gliding perfectly straight down the block going at a steady speed.
Stood in a courtyard between buildings. Saw small bright light followed by a large craft 200’ft up flying slowly above the city
A white orb with no sound no satellite no drone, full white orb with steady pace speed and no quick vanish and no acceleration
We saw 2 V-shaped objects that had 5 large red lights on the underside of the wings. Very silent hum could be heard.
Red light with egg shaped green craft
A sphere flashing in multiple colors and changing shape
A dark green orb hovering above my head almost in a circle. After the eye contact its motion stopped and it "Phased" vanishing after.
Zero movement. Stationary. Slow rotation. Manually zoom in video to see possible energy field, aura or haze.
Craft was stationary, rotating, no movement in any direction, aura, light, sunlight reflected from west
Low Rocket Like Bass Sound That Traveled West To North-East Lasting Around 5 Minutes
Star-like light zigzagged overhead, then accelerated, made a sharp 90° turn, silent, and vanished in seconds.
White or starlight orbs entering and leaving Orion's belt
